sourceRepoPolicy: non-destructive federation: source repos remain intact; kernel may reference, query, adapt, or copy approved reusable artifacts, but must not rip apart, move, delete, or rewrite upstream repos without explicit approval

repos.consolidation: extract reusable scaffolds, UI patterns, and platform conventions
